name: Shax
author: Abstract Games factory
description: The Somali national mill game (also jare/jar). Each player places 12 men until the 24-point board is completely full - mills formed while placing capture nothing, but the FIRST mill ('jare') wins priority: its owner removes an enemy man first, the opponent removes one too, and the jare-maker moves first. Then slide men to form mills and capture. No flying; a blocked player is never lost - the opponent must free them ('jid i sii aan jar aheyn'), capturing nothing even if the freeing move mills. Reduce the opponent to two men to win.
